conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
I felt the strongest connections with I, G, and C, as our conversations flowed naturally around shared goals like supporting our families and building alliances— for instance, I and I bonded over coordinating strategies and pitching ideas to the group, which made me feel truly aligned; G and I quickly teamed up to scout for trustworthy partners, emphasizing fairness and mutual support; and with C, we discussed subtle signals and discreet strategy-sharing, which solidified a sense of camaraderie. In contrast, I felt least connected to A, as our chats felt more transactional, focusing on quickly moving on to approach others like B without delving deeper into personal motivations or building much rapport. Overall, these interactions highlighted how mutual interests in family and teamwork fostered deeper bonds for me.

Yes, I made several agreements, such as with C to use a nodding signal for coordination, with G to team up and scout for allies, and with I to discuss group strategies. Going into the game, I trust I, G, and C based on our genuine conversations and shared values, but I don't specifically distrust anyone yet, though I'll stay cautious with those like A who seemed less engaged.
